name: Areesh Alam
about: Aoa, I'm Areesh Alam. I'm pretty much nobody, I don't have much of an introduction. So, Basically, the reason I'm making this video is that we all know there are conflicts going on this world such as the Palestine and Israel conflict and some other hidden to most of the people. I just want to play my part in doing the right thing which is I've got to say a lot of things 'To be specific', 'Truth' which I'm not sure, but I think a lot of people would love to know. So right now I'm going to talk about Palestine-Israel conflict and To be specific, It's origin and further in more videos I'll try to decrack some other hidden stuff. My videos might get removed as Instagram is removing other people's content relating to the support of Palestine so my could be next.
